RhizoGenie — diagnostics

Reads what the microbes actually do — the functional biology conventional labs miss. Recurring test revenue.

Biomizer — treatment

Turns the diagnosis into action and closes the loop. Real product, real market, real regulation.

Business model · capital-efficient

Recurring revenue, near-zero infra

Land with a low-friction subscription; expand into audits and retainers. Local-first infrastructure keeps cost of delivery near zero.

The method · the engine

Eyes before muscle

Nature’s rule for every system that survives: never let a process grade its own work. We build software the same way.

01

Observe

An independent witness records what actually happened — not what the agent claims.

→
02

Verify

Reconcile against reality. Count the source, don’t trust the summary.

→
03

Act

Only proven state moves forward. Trust becomes infrastructure.

🧬

Proofreading polymerase

DNA is checked by a separate enzyme — verification decoupled from writing.

🛡️

Immune self / non-self

The body checks against a reference no intruder can edit.

🔔

Quorum sensing

Cells act only when the colony agrees — trust from the environment.

🐜

Stigmergy

The trail in the world is the append-only ledger. No manager needed.

The output · leverage

The same method becomes an OS

The way we read soil — observe, verify against reality, then act — is general. It wraps any workflow in an agentic harness: agents do the work, an independent witness proves it. So each new market we enter launches faster and cheaper than the last. Soil is simply the first.

verified actions per person

workflows live

The receipt rail

append-only · out-of-band · the agent never holds the pen
    The model scales · the federation

    One method, many verticals

    The Holding = the shared brain

    Carries the reliability layer, the data, and the playbook. Each operator owns a vertical; the Holding compounds across all of them.

    Each vertical launches faster & cheaper
    Data & trust compound centrally
    Market signal · the demand is speaking

    The market is naming our gap

    Across scraped community research and direct outreach, builders and operators came back with the same conclusion — unprompted: production needs verification, not just automation.

    “Receipts are what separate production-grade agent systems from demos that work until they don’t.”

    DF
    Daniel Fazio
    Founder / operator

    “Out-of-band observer, append-only log, verify by reconciliation. You named the three rules precisely.”

    MK
    Michael Kidder
    Systems builder

    “AI monitoring AI is a paradox and a token-sink — you don’t trust the monitor. Reconciliation is the way out.”

    MS
    Matthew Snow
    Engineer

    “The systems earn their keep when you’re away from the machine — exactly where verification matters most.”

    FR
    Florian Rolke
    Practitioner

    “I’ve built this and it makes an immeasurable difference.”

    AG
    Austin Gebhardt
    Builder
